articles.title: LinkedIn faces complaint over its selling of user data
articles.description: A prominent data protection group on Tuesday filed a complaint in Austria against LinkedIn over the professional networking platform's selling of user data. Vienna-based Noyb -- which stands for "None of Your Business" -- said it filed a complaint with the Austrian Data Protection Authority on behalf of a LinkedIn user wanting access to his data.

articles.title: iPhone 17 Was Best-Selling Handset Globally in Q1 2026, Samsung Galaxy A07 4G Ranked Top Android Phone: Counterpoint
articles.description: iPhone 17 series took the first three spots in becoming the best-selling smartphones globally in the first quarter (Q1) of 2026, according to the latest Counterpoint Research report. Leading the pack was the standard iPhone 17 model, commanding a 6 percent market share of all the handsets sold globally in the quarter. Following the standard model were the iPhone 17 Pr...

articles.title: Anand Mahindra shares images of Thar-based Military ATV: Gets stunning mods
articles.description: Mahindra Group has unveiled a rugged new all-terrain vehicle (ATV) for defence forces, built on the Thar Roxx platform. This mission-ready machine boasts a stripped-down, open design with a tubular roll cage, heavy-duty bumper, and modular storage. Airdrop-ready, it promises resilience and adaptability for any terrain, reflecting Mahindra's core philosophy.

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy S27 Ultra Tipped to Feature 200-Megapixel Camera With Variable Aperture to Rival iPhone 18 Pro Max
articles.description: Samsung and Huawei are said to be testing 200-megapixel main rear cameras with variable apertures. The Galaxy S27 Ultra, which is likely to launch early next year, will likely include this feature. Variable aperture offers improvements over the fixed apertures available in current Galaxy S series smartphones. Samsung implemented the variable aperture technology in the...

articles.title: Instagram explores 'AI creator' tag for accounts posting AI content: Report
articles.description: Instagram on AI Content: Instagram is testing 'AI creator' labels to show if content is made with AI, but creators don't have to use them, so many posts may still appear without clear tags

articles.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Has A Message On AI Fear, ‘Don’t Panic Over...'
articles.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang says AI will create jobs, not replace them. Speaking at the Milken Institute, he urges people to avoid fear-driven narratives and focus on real opportunities.

articles.title: AI in Healthcare: Setting new benchmarks in modern medicine
articles.description: AI is transforming India’s healthcare ecosystem, enabling faster diagnostics, smarter treatments, and wider access to care. The Healthcare & MedTech category recognises solutions delivering real-world impact and clinical accuracy. It celebrates innovations that are scalable, responsible, and improving patient outcomes at scale.

articles.title: Hack of the day: Create custom WhatsApp lists for busy chats
articles.description: WhatsApp users can now manage overwhelming inboxes by utilizing the new Lists feature. This tool allows for the creation of custom filters, grouping conversations by categories like family, school, or work. By organizing chats into dedicated lists, users can streamline their messaging experience and focus on specific types of conversations without endless scrolling.

articles.title: CSA tasks critical information infrastructure leaders to review cyber risks due to AI-enabled threats
articles.description: "This is not an issue that should be delegated to IT teams alone. It demands leadership attention at the highest levels," said Senior Minister of State for Digital Development and Information Tan Kiat How.

articles.description: Elon Musk settles SEC lawsuit over delayed Twitter stake disclosure for $1.5 million, avoiding a $150 million repayment claim as regulators soften stance on enforcement

articles.title: Prepaid smart meters to operate as postpaid in Uttar Pradesh
articles.description: The decision announced by energy minister AK Sharma comes amid a growing number of state-wide protests against smart prepaid meters.

articles.description: Helping enterprises unshackle billions of lines of legacy code they are buried under unlocks opportunities for Indian IT. But firms, especially Indian enterprises, should examine their AI readiness, writes ET.

articles.title: ET Graphics: AI puts data handlers on
articles.description: Cloud companies are capitalising on the AI surge. Spending on AI infrastructure is rapidly increasing, with billions committed for future years. Meanwhile, the market for AI chips is becoming more competitive. Nvidia's valuation is soaring, but other players are entering the arena. This dynamic signals major shifts in the technology landscape.

articles.title: Startups lead AI push into construction amid labour shortages
articles.description: Construction is fast shedding its tech-resistant tag as AI-powered startups roll up sleeves to tackle labour shortages and speed up industry’s digital transformation, writes ET.

articles.title: Gift City turns growth lever for cross-border digital payment firms
articles.description: Cross-border digital payment firms are increasingly targeting Gift City for growth, seeking Payment Service Provider (PSP) licenses to cater to international travelers and businesses. Companies like Razorpay, Cashfree, and Skydo are exploring this route to offer multi-currency wallets and streamline import-export flows, complementing existing RBI licenses.

articles.title: Govt eyeing minimum design skills target for component scheme companies
articles.description: New government rules may soon require companies under the Electronic Component Manufacturing Scheme to invest in design capabilities. Currently, many firms only assemble products. The government wants them to develop high-value design work locally. This initiative aims to boost India's electronics sector. Companies not investing in design may be removed from the scheme.

articles.title: Google Pixel 11, Pixel 11 Pro, Pixel 11 Pro XL, Pixel 11 Pro Fold specs leak
articles.description: A new leak today claims to bring us a ton of details about the upcoming Google Pixel 11 family, so let's dive right in. All devices will be using the Tensor G6 SoC, which will be built on a TSMC N2 (2nm) node. Its CPU will have one ARM C1-Ultra core at 4.11GHz, four ARM C1-Pro cores at 3.38GHz, and two ARM C1-Pro cores at 2.65GHz. The PowerVR C-Series CXTP-48-1536 GPU will be in, as will be Google's Titan M3 security chip. The modem will be the MediaTek M90 (MT6986D). There will also be a new Tensor Processing Unit (TPU) baked in. Now onto the smartphones themselves. The vanilla Pixel 11...

articles.title: EU DMA after-action review didn't go the way that Apple wanted
articles.description: Apple's vice president of products & regulatory law Kyle Andeer lashed out at the European Union's Digital Markets Act, repeating the refrains that unfair targeting and requirement that it must share tech with rivals will put users worldwide at risk. Apple slams EU DMA over privacy and innovation risks Two years after the Digital Market Act went into effect , Apple is still vehemently opposed to the European Union telling it what to do. It's hardly a new stance. Apple has been beating the same drum since the Digital Markets Act (DMA) was first proposed . Continue Reading on AppleInsider | Discuss on our Forums

articles.title: Roomba inventor unveils a companion robot that's more pet than helper
articles.description: The unnamed Familiar exists more for emotional support than completing tasks. At this point, most home robots are either glorified vacuums or far-off concepts that may never become commercially available. However, we just got a look at a new home companion robot potentially coming to market next year, and its inventor has a proven track record of ...

articles.title: Tuesday Motivation by Henry Ford: 'Obstacles are those frightful things you see when you take your eyes off your...'
articles.description: Henry Ford, a visionary industrialist, revolutionized manufacturing with the Model T and the assembly line, making cars accessible to the masses. What truly set Ford apart was his use of the assembly line. His innovative approach to production and worker wages significantly shaped the modern economy. Despite controversies, Ford's impact on mass production and serving ordinary people remains undeniable.

articles.title: Report: iPhone 17 ranked as world’s top-selling smartphone in Q1 2026
articles.description: A new Counterpoint Research report shows that the iPhone 17 overtook the iPhone 17 Pro Max and became the world’s best-selling smartphone during the first three months of 2026. Here are the details. more...

articles.title: Hands-on: This charging station has quietly become a desk essential [Video]
articles.description: One of the best ways to judge how good a product is, is simply how long it sticks around. There are tons of products that hit my desk that, for one reason or another, do not make it past one month of use. It could be poorly built, too cheap, not a good fit for my aesthetic, or for any other reason. But if a product earns a permanent spot on my desk or nightstand and I stop thinking about replacing it, that’s usually a really good sign. So when I noticed I had been using my Nomos charging station for about a year, I knew I had to give you my review. Here is what it is and how well it’s held up. more...

articles.title: John Chayka and Mats Sundin to meet Toronto Maple Leafs head coach Craig Berube, as they lead the team’s front office roles
articles.description: Toronto Maple Leafs have appointed Mats Sundin as Senior Executive Advisor and John Chayka as General Manager to spearhead a new era. The duo will soon meet with Head Coach Craig Berube to discuss the team's direction. Despite a disappointing season, Chayka expressed optimism about the roster's potential and vowed to implement systemic changes for improved performance.

articles.title: Siemens delivers first batch of D9 electric freight locomotives to Indian Railways
articles.description: Siemens Ltd said it has handed over first set of 9000 HP electric freight locomotives (D9) to Indian Railways.

articles.title: The Best Dedicated Hosting Services for 2026
articles.description: Dedicated servers are vital hosting platforms for resource-intensive online businesses. These tested, top-rated web hosts deliver the reliability and power that mission-critical websites demand.

articles.title: Toronto Maple Leafs officially hire Mats Sundin and John Chayka to lead their front office following their disastrous season
articles.description: The Toronto Maple Leafs have appointed franchise icon Mats Sundin as Senior Executive Advisor and John Chayka as General Manager to revitalize the organization. This move follows a disappointing season and aims to restore the team's pride and guide them into a new era. Both individuals expressed excitement and gratitude for the opportunity to contribute to the team's success.

articles.title: Chinese Worker Sued After His Company Replaced Him With AI. He Just Won
articles.description: The Hangzhou Intermediate People's Court finds that the company didn't really need to replace its employee with AI, and owed him greater protection or compensation for the move.

articles.title: Apple launches new Pride Edition Sport Loop for Apple Watches
articles.description: Today, Apple unveiled a new Pride Collection Sport Loop for 40mm, 42mm, and 46mm Apple Watches. It's available to order right now from the company's website and will set you back $49. It will also be available at Apple Stores "beginning later this week", according to Apple's press release. The band is woven from a rainbow of 11 colors on nylon yarns, with intricate weaving that blends one color into the next, "creating depth and movement across the band", Apple says. The design is "joyful and vibrant, showcasing a full spectrum of colors that reflect the unique identities that shape LGBTQ+...

articles.description: iOS 27 is again rumored to include a useful new feature for the Wallet app. A new report today says iOS 27 will add a “Create a Pass” feature to the Wallet app, allowing users to convert physical passes to digital ones. Here’s how it will work. more...

articles.title: BenQ launches Mobiuz EX271QZ 27-inch QHD 500Hz QD-OLED gaming monitor in India
articles.description: BenQ has launched its new Mobiuz monitor in India, featuring a 27-inch QHD QD-OLED panel with a 500Hz refresh rate. This display is designed for gamers and creators, offering exceptional motion clarity and color accuracy. Priced at Rs 84,998, it aims to provide both performance and artistic visual experiences.

articles.description: Amid falling revenue and store closures, GameStop wants to buy the much larger eBay.

articles.title: Upset Nvidia CEO Jensen Hunag to Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei: Get out of your ‘God complex’ and stop ...
articles.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang dismisses AI job loss predictions as 'ridiculous,' urging tech leaders to abandon their 'God complex.' He argues AI is a job creator, citing increased demand for software engineers and the Jevons paradox, where efficiency drives greater consumption and thus more jobs. Huang warns that discouraging technical careers could harm the US economy.

articles.title: Samsung Messages Is Going Away Soon. Check Out Our Top Alternatives

articles.title: Apple's 2026 Pride Collection includes 11-color weaved Sport Band
articles.description: The 2026 Apple Pride Collection has arrived, with a new Apple Watch Pride Edition Sport Loop accompanied by a matching watch face and Pride Luminance wallpapers. Apple Watch Pride Edition Sport Loop for 2026 - Image Credit: Apple Each year, Apple releases Pride Editions of Apple Watch bands, as part of its work to champion LGBTQ+ equality. On May 4, the 2026 batch became available. The new Pride Edition Sport Loop is woven from nylon yarns in 11 colors. The weaving blends the colors into each other, which Apple describes as reflecting the "unique identities that shape LGBTQ+ communities worldwide." Continue Reading on AppleInsider | Discuss on our Forums

articles.title: IB Security Assistant final result 2026 released at mha.gov.in: Direct link to download list of shortlisted candidates
articles.description: The Intelligence Bureau has announced the final results for the Security Assistant/Motor Transport exam 2025 today, May 4, 2026. Candidates can find their names on the official MHA website. The selection is based on Tier-I and Tier-II performance, including a driving test and interview. Provisionally selected candidates need to complete pending document submissions.
